headline: Reflecting On Consumer Discretionary - Real Estate Services Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: CBRE (NYSE:CBRE)
summary: Looking back on consumer discretionary - real estate services stocks’ Q4 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including CBRE (NYSE:CBRE) and its peers.
